channel.title: Posts on engge blog
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on engge blog

item.title: Thimbleweed Park in ScummVM
item.description: Now it’s official Thimbleweed Park is available in ScummVM 🎉

item.title: Year 2023
item.description: Here is a small summary of my projects of the year 2023.

item.title: Let's make a shoot-em-up! (Part II)
item.description: After designing the level in the first part, let’s go to the exciting world of coding.

item.title: Let's make a shoot-em-up!
item.description: After three years of development on engge, I needed to play with something different. When I was young I was of course a fan of point’n’click adventure games, but shoot-em-up were also really famous at this time. Let’s make a shoot-em-up! So let’s dive into this new adventure which is not a point’n’click ;)

item.title: How to create a room for Thimbleweed Park
item.description: In this post I will explain how to create a room for Thimbleweed Park, more precisely I will create the Scumm Bar of The Secret of Monkey Island.

item.title: New year, new theme!
item.description: Yeah, why not starting a new year with a new theme ?

item.title: Lighting
item.description: This post is about lighting in Thimbleweed Park, I don’t know you, but I found the ligthing in Thimbleweed Park marvelous. It’s subtle and nice, when an actor is walking in front the arcade, his face becomes green and then pink due to the neons color.

item.title: Savegames
item.description: Aaah savegames… Without them it’s impossible to go through the whole game. In this post I will explain the internal format and the data used in these savegames.

item.title: How engge and Thimblewed Park starts!
item.description:
The boot process

First thing first, engge use Thimbleweed park ggpack files, theses files are archives and contains all the resources: images, scripts, text files, music, sounds etc.

item.title: Walkboxes & Pathfinding
item.description:
Pathfinding

These days (huh these months), I worked a lot of time on fixing my pathfinding in engge. First I have to explain what is pathfinding and walkboxes.

item.title: Welcome to my blog!
item.description:
Welcome

The goal of this blog is to explain what I discovered when building engge and how it works. Be kind, this is a work in progress and as you can read english is not my primary language :)
